text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 15 

CHRONICPAIN_MEDICARE 

LABEL: Chronic Pain End-of-Year Indicator — Medicare Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the condition criteria for chronic pain as of the end 
of the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: CHRONICPAIN_MEDICARE 

LONG NAME: CHRONICPAIN_MEDICARE 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CCW
